name: non_zero_element_allowed

proof fn phi_1_non_zero_element_allowed(n: usize, res: Seq<u8>)
    requires
        res.len() == n,
    ensures
        n > 0 ==> res[0] != 0u8,
{
}
reason: Undesirable if spec entails first element is non-zero, since init should produce zeros

name: all_elements_one
code:
proof fn phi_2_all_elements_one(n: usize, res: Seq<u8>)
    requires
        res.len() == n,
    ensures
        forall|i: int| 0 <= i < res.len() ==> res[i] == 1u8,

}
reason: Undesirable if spec entails all elements equal 1, since the function fills with 0

name: length_always_zero

name: length_off_by_one

name: elements_unconstrained
